channel.title: FilmyChill — New Movies & OTT Releases This Week in India
channel.description: What's worth watching this week in India — new theatre and OTT releases with ratings and verdicts. Updated twice daily.

item.title: I Will Find You — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · English · ★ 8.2 · Must watch — Wrongfully imprisoned for murdering his own son, a father sets out on a desperate rescue mission after learning the boy may still be alive.

item.title: Heartstopper Forever — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · English · ★ 6.7 · Worth a watch — It's a new school year for the Truham-Higgs gang. As Nick and Charlie's relationship deepens, their thoughts turn to life after the last bell rings.

item.title: The Odyssey — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.7 · Must watch — Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War.

item.title: Pritam and Pedro — JioHotstar
item.description: JioHotstar · Hindi · ★ 8.6 · Must watch — The dynamic between the two contrasting personalities, a seasoned cop who prefers old-school methods and a tech-savvy cop who relies on modern technology for…

item.title: Lingam — JioHotstar
item.description: JioHotstar · Tamil · Not enough ratings yet — Framed for a crime he didn't commit, a kabaddi hero gets pushed into a world he never wanted and ultimately becomes a feared name.

item.title: Dhamaal 4 — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Hindi · Not enough ratings yet — The Dhamaal boys are back for another treasure hunt, facing hilarious challenges in their quest for the Treasure of Life.

item.title: Idhayam Murali — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Tamil · Not enough ratings yet — A young man navigates the complexities of unrequited love, finding that even as years pass and life takes unexpected turns, certain emotions remain deeply…

item.title: Lenin — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Telugu · Not enough ratings yet — Young, urban-raised Lenin's peaceful romance with Bharathi inadvertently sparks a violent, large-scale village conflict.

item.title: Moana — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 5.8 · Decent one-time watch — Teenage Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable…

item.title: Evil Dead Burn — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.8 · Worth a watch — After her husband's abrupt death, Alice seeks solace with his remaining family — descendants of a leading researcher on demonic possession.

item.title: Super Subbu — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Telugu · Not enough ratings yet — An unlucky teacher is assigned to teach sex ed in a hostile village. Can he balance this secret while chasing his dreams and saving his relationship?

item.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Japanese · ★ 8.5 · Must watch — When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every…

item.title: Alpha — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Hindi · Not enough ratings yet — When Sita, a highly trained assassin raised in isolation as a super-soldier by a rogue commander, discovers the dark truth about her family and her stolen…

item.title: Silo — Apple TV
item.description: Apple TV · English · ★ 8.2 · Must watch — In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously,…

item.title: X-Men '97 — JioHotstar
item.description: JioHotstar · English · ★ 8.6 · Must watch — The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a…

item.title: Alliance — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · Hindi · Not enough ratings yet — A competitive captive reality show blending high-stakes strategy, economy and psychological warfare.

item.title: House of the Dragon — JioHotstar
item.description: JioHotstar · English · ★ 8.4 · Must watch — The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights.
